section: 1. General information
text:
General information

This privacy policy informs you about the processing of personal data in
connection with our websites and online presences.
embed_text:
Hetzner Online GmbH — Data Privacy Policy
Source: https://www.hetzner.com/legal/privacy-policy/
Version: April 16, 2025
Retrieved: 2026-04-22


1. General information

This privacy policy informs you about the processing of personal data in
connection with our websites and online presences. Who is officially responsible for processing the data?

embed_text:
How will my application data be managed?

All applications are entered into our applicant management system. If you
applied by post, we will digitize your documents and return the originals to
you. To process your application, a candidate profile will be created in the system.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data.
embed_text:
General

The chatbot collects and uses any and all information that you provide it with. To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data. (Hereafter, we will refer to this tool as
the "PII tool"; "PII" is short for personally identifiable information.)

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
If you
(accidentally) enter personal data in the chatbot, the tool will automatically
recognize it and respond by asking you to enter your request/question again, but
this time without personal data.
embed_text:
(Hereafter, we will refer to this tool as
the "PII tool"; "PII" is short for personally identifiable information.) If you

recognize it and respond by asking you to enter your request/question again, but
this time without personal data. The following cookies are used:

Session-Cookie: Contains a session ID and information about the referring page
Google-Cookies: Google reCAPTCHA is used.

there.

After a customer account is deactivated, the following retention periods apply:

Without product usage: 3 years
With product usage (invoicing): 14 years (in accordance with tax and commercial
law retention obligations)
Unverified customer accounts: 14 days after the end of the failed verification
period

Once these periods have expired, your data will be archived in our long-term
backup systems.

mentioning us), we also process the following data: your username, information
from your publicly visible profile, the content of your message or interaction
(such as replies, mentions, or direct messages).

is completed. We are not required to inform you if your identity verification
data has been affected by a security incident, as iDenfy bears sole
responsibility for such notifications.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: We process this data to ensure the secure and stable operation of our website.
embed_text:
When you access our website, your browser automatically sends the following
data: IP address, browser type and version, date and time of access, the
website you came from, and the specific page accessed. We process this data to ensure the secure and stable operation of our website. Since the IP address is stored in anonymized form, no retention period is
required.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?
text:
The GDPR grants you the following rights regarding your data:

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login.
embed_text:
The GDPR grants you the following rights regarding your data:

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login. Right to rectification:
If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,
you can request its correction or completion.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?

If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,

account login. Right to rectification:
If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,
you can request its correction or completion. Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
You cannot request the deletion of your data solely on the grounds that it is no
longer required for its original purpose.

If the account information we have stored about you is incorrect or incomplete,

You cannot request the deletion of your data solely on the grounds that it is no
longer required for its original purpose. However, please note that immediate deletion may not be
possible in some cases due to legal or contractual retention obligations.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?

embed_text:
Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
You cannot request the deletion of your data solely on the grounds that it is no
longer required for its original purpose. However, please note that immediate deletion may not be
possible in some cases due to legal or contractual retention obligations. If, for example, you dispute the accuracy of your data or believe that the
processing is unlawful, you must submit a written request by post to our data
protection officer to restrict the processing of your data.

processing is unlawful, you must submit a written request by post to our data
protection officer to restrict the processing of your data.

section: 7. Voluntary nature of data provision
text:
7. Voluntary nature of data provision

There is no statutory obligation for you to provide your data to Hetzner Online
GmbH.
embed_text:
We always strive to resolve
any possible disagreements as quickly and smoothly as possible. 7. Voluntary nature of data provision

There is no statutory obligation for you to provide your data to Hetzner Online
GmbH. However, you cannot use some of our services if you do not provide your
data to us.

section: 7. Voluntary nature of data provision
text:
However, you cannot use some of our services if you do not provide your
data to us.
embed_text:
7. Voluntary nature of data provision

There is no statutory obligation for you to provide your data to Hetzner Online
GmbH. However, you cannot use some of our services if you do not provide your
data to us. Your decision to provide us with your personal data is completely
voluntary.
